abilities.name: From the Shadows
abilities.description: On Initiative, if no enemy aware unfriendly, may take additional turn before Initiative order.

abilities.name: Lone Assassin
abilities.description: Gains Focused +1 when attacking character 6+ yards from allies.

actions: (1) Katana (Melee) | AV: 5 (13) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/5 damage. Weapon gains + to damage.

(1) Clockwork Rifle (Long Arms) | AV: 6 (14) | Rg: z14 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/5 damage. Gains + to attack. Range +10 per + from Focused. Ram Critical Strike: +1 per Ram. Capacity 1, Reload 2.
(0) Poisoned Dart (Archery) | AV: 5 (13) | Rg: z6 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/1/2 damage, gains Poison +1.
system.notes: Tongueless assassins of Ansatsu dojo. Serve Ten Thunders as precision killers. Communicate via secret gestures. Clockwork rifles with extended focus range.
